servers.name: PulsedMC - Hosting - FREE
servers.description:
PulsedMC is a modern, high-performance Minecraft server hosting provider built for players, developers, and communities of all sizes. We deliver powerful hardware, instant server deployment, an intuitive control panel, and reliable uptime to ensure your Minecraft server runs at its best.

Whether you're creating a small survival world, a large network, or a custom modded experience, PulsedMC provides the speed, stability, and flexibility you need. With premium DDoS protection, fast NVMe storage, high-performance CPUs, and responsive customer support, we make hosting your Minecraft server simple and hassle-free.

Our mission is to provide affordable, reliable, and feature-rich game hosting backed by exceptional service, giving every community the tools to grow and succeed.

servers.name: Unbent Flames
servers.description:
**🔥 UNBENT FLAMES 🔥**
*Where the blocks fly and the adventure never stops!*

---

**⚡️ Dive into a **modpack‑like** experience—**no client mods required!** ⚡️**
**🧪 Slimefun + ItemAdder = 1500+ new items & recipes**
**🪄 Magic & Technology trees** – master spells, build machines, dominate the world!

---

### 🌍 WHY YOU’LL LOVE IT

- **🏘️ Build Nations & Rule the Skies** – Create epic towns, forge alliances, and pilot massive airships.
- **🌊 Harness Bending Power** – Unleash elemental magic and crush every opponent.
- **⚔️ Epic Adventures** – Face elite mobs, complete guild quests, and battle world‑shaking bosses.
- **🗺️ Living World** – Explore custom structures, hidden treasures, and a map that evolves every day.
- **💀 Resurrection Chests** – Keep your gear safe and jump back into the action instantly.
- **⛏️ Auto‑Mining** – Quarries work 24/7 for endless resources.

---

### 🚀 QUALITY‑OF‑LIFE & EXTRAS

- **⚔️ RPG Progression** – Level skills, become unstoppable.
- **💼 Jobs System** – Earn cash and climb the ranks.
- **🐾 MyPet Companions** – Adventure with your own pet.
- **🌲 TreeAssist** – Faster, smoother wood cutting.
- **🔐 Player Vaults** – Secure storage for everyone.
- **🎁 Reward Ads** – Earn perks while supporting the server.
- **🎤 Simple Voice Chat** – Talk with friends in‑game.
- **🗺️ BlueMap** – Real‑time world view.

---

### 📡 SERVER INFO

- **🖥️ Java IP:** unbent.mnt.li`
- **📱 Bedrock IP:** unbent.xyz:25668
- **🖥️ alternative java IP: unbent.xyz:25570
- **🗺️ BlueMap:** unbent.xyz:25882
- **💬 Discord:** discord.gg/EVfNrqp2JE

---

**⚔️ BUILD. BEND. CONQUER.**
**🔥 Join Unbent Flames now and shape the world your way!**

servers.name: CofferCraft
servers.description: CofferCraft is a fun and creative Minecraft server where players can build, explore, and hunt for hidden vaults full of treasure! Join epic events, claim land, earn rewards, and enjoy a welcoming community.

servers.name: GTM - GTA-based minecraft server for Java
servers.description:
Grand Theft Minecart is the most played Grand Theft Auto server in Minecraft. We provide a completely custom gamemode, GTM, where you can use our 48 custom weapons from shotguns to snipers, all unique to GTM. Not only do we provide a variety of weapons, but also custom vehicles from cars to tanks, and even planes. You can become one of the richest criminals and own your own big penthouse apartment in our custom-built map. At GTM you can find a big community, with gangs and multiple languages. Our frequent, large updates can be enjoyed as we make the server even cooler and fun for everyone. ​

Grand Theft Minecart is our oldest gamemode - hop into the city of MineSantos, loot chests full of awesome gear, and have fun with your friends. Be careful though, there are police roaming the streets, and they do not like murderers! As you rank up, gain access to more and more powerful weapons and vehicles, and purchase a wonderful apartment or house to store all your stuff. Join a Gang, or make your own, and become the Crime Lord of Los Santos. At Grand Theft Minecart the opportunities are limitless.

You can only join with original (paid) Minecraft Java Edition version 1.19.4 -> 26.2+

servers.name: Timelords
servers.description:
An incremental RPG Minecraft server featuring custom mobs, mining progression, gear systems, and more.

Become the most powerful in a world like no other. Progress through the story of the game while unlocking unique abilities and items.

This server has completely custom features with engaging gameplay and user friendly interfaces.

Come check out Minecraft's best incremental RPG game!

servers.name: GroundZero
servers.description:
## 🧟 Welcome to GroundZero

GroundZero is a **modded Zombie Survival Roleplay** experience where **mods and custom plugin systems work together** to create one connected world.

Choose your own path. Become a **Guard**, build a **drug empire**, defend valuable **convoys**, run your own **business**, explore dangerous **POIs**, uncover hidden secrets, or simply fight to survive in a world where every decision matters.

Unlike traditional servers, GroundZero is built through **live development**. The community helps shape the future of the server as we continue expanding the world with new systems, cities and content.

## 🌍 Features

* 🧟 Modded Zombie Survival
* 🚓 Player-Driven Police System
* 💊 Drug Production & Black Market
* 🚚 Convoy Missions
* ⛏️ Prison System
* 🏗️ Community City Unlocks
* 🏚️ Base Building & Raiding
* ⚔️ PvP & Red Zones
* 🔫 Modded Weapons
* 🌾 Farming, Fishing & Trading
* 🎭 Optional Roleplay

## 🚀 How to Join

Joining GroundZero is easy!

1. Join our **Discord** using the link below.
2. Download the **official GroundZero Modpack** from our Discord.
3. Import the modpack into **CurseForge**.
4. Launch Minecraft and connect to the server using the IP provided in Discord.

💬 **Discord:https://discord.gg/Ec7xaMut2f

## ❤️ Support the Project

servers.name: Calamity SMP
servers.description:
Turns out we want the player base to be larger than we originally intended for, so I'm putting ads out here to get more players. I'm also gonna give out some details here:

Lifesteal (we made the heart recipe more expensive so you can't craft your way to 20 hearts)
2 maces (they have to be held by different teams, and those teams can't be allied)
Worldborder is 10k in each direction
String dupers and infinite restocks are enabled

clients.name: Pulsed Client
clients.description:
The Minecraft client
built to perform.
Instant installs, 10,000+ mods, server hosting, and real FPS gains all in one launcher. Free forever.

Everything competitive players actually need, without the clutter.

Browse and install from Modrinth's entire catalogue directly inside the launcher. Pulsed matches mods to your version and loads them with Fabric automatically.

Create isolated instances for each Minecraft version. Separate mods, worlds, and resource packs per instance - no cross-contamination, no breakage.

Preview skins on a real 3D model, import any player's skin by username, and save a personal collection. Swap in seconds before you launch.

Browse popular servers with live player counts and ping. Hit join and you're in - no copying IPs, no alt-tabbing, no fuss.

hosts.name: PulsedMC
hosts.description:
Minecraft Server Hosting
Your server, your way.

Launch a Minecraft server in minutes. Choose a plan, we'll handle the setup, and you're ready to play. Manage everything from your browser—console, files, plugins, mods, and backups. No command line required.

Manage from anywhere.

Control your server from any device with an intuitive web panel.

Live console
File manager
Plugin & mod support
One-click backups
Full configuration access

No SSH. No terminal. Just complete control.

Get online in minutes
1. Choose a plan

Start with our free plan or upgrade anytime. No credit card required to get started.

2. We handle the setup

We'll configure your panel account and deploy your Minecraft server. Most servers are ready the same day.

3. Start playing

Invite your friends, install plugins or mods, customize your world, and manage everything from your browser.

Or, if you want it to sound more like premium hosting companies (such as Apex, Bisect, or PebbleHost), you could use:

Minecraft Server Hosting
Everything you need to host Minecraft.

Deploy your server in minutes with an easy-to-use control panel. We take care of the setup so you can focus on playing.

✔ Browser-based management
Control your console, files, plugins, mods, and backups from anywhere.

✔ Fast deployment
Choose a plan and we'll have your server ready as quickly as possible.

✔ Full control
Customize every aspect of your server without touching the command line.

How it works

Choose your plan
Start free or select the resources you need. No credit card required for the free plan.

We deploy your server
Your panel account and Minecraft server are configured for you.

Play together
Join instantly, invite friends, and manage your server from any browser.
